injuries.comment: The Islanders said on Friday (Sept. 12) that Nurmi underwent a procedure on his left knee and will be out of action for 4-6 weeks.
The Islanders reported on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Varlamov is skating and progressing, but no definitive timeframe for when he will rejoin the group.
The Islanders said on Thursday (Sept. 18) that Engvall had hip surgery over the summer and is expected to join the group in the next 2-3 weeks.
